name: Drag-and-Drop Upload
notes: handleDrop processes only files[0] — multi-file drops silently discard all files after the first.
Drag visual feedback is managed by isDragging state toggled by handleDragEnter/handleDragLeave; handleDragOver only calls preventDefault so the browser allows the drop.

uploadFile is a shared method called by both the drop handler (handleDrop) and the click-to-browse handler (handleFileInputChange), so the two upload paths are identical once a File object is obtained.
On successful upload the component immediately re-fetches the full document list via loadDocuments(); the 'done' progress indicator is cleared after a 2-second timeout.
